study_title: App-Guided Exercise Therapy for Knee Osteoarthritis (KNEE-MOVE)
design_summary: 12-week, single-arm study of an app-guided home exercise program for knee osteoarthritis. Participants complete three guided strengthening sessions per week and log pain weekly in the study app.

criteria.probe: Has a doctor diagnosed you with osteoarthritis of the knee?

criteria.text: Knee pain on most days for at least the past 3 months.
criteria.probe: Have you had knee pain on most days for at least the past three months?

criteria.text: Average knee pain between 4 and 8 inclusive on a 0-10 scale over the past week.
criteria.probe: On a scale from 0 to 10, what has your average knee pain been over the past week?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant cannot or will not give a usable 0-10 average pain rating, INC4 is unknown.

criteria.text: Able to walk without a walker or wheelchair (using a cane is acceptable).
criteria.probe: Are you able to walk without a walker or wheelchair - a cane is fine?

criteria.text: Owns a smartphone and is willing to complete three guided exercise sessions per week for 12 weeks.
criteria.probe: Do you own a smartphone, and could you commit to three guided sessions a week for the full 12 weeks?

criteria.text: Knee replacement surgery on the affected knee, either already performed or scheduled within the next 6 months.
criteria.probe: Have you had knee replacement surgery on that knee, or is one scheduled in the next six months?

criteria.text: Corticosteroid (cortisone) injection in the affected knee within the past 3 months.
criteria.probe: Have you had a cortisone injection in that knee in the past three months?

criteria.text: Diagnosed inflammatory arthritis (for example rheumatoid or psoriatic arthritis).
criteria.probe: Have you been diagnosed with an inflammatory arthritis, such as rheumatoid or psoriatic arthritis?

criteria.text: Currently enrolled in another interventional clinical trial, or currently attending a structured physical-therapy program for the knee.
criteria.probe: Are you currently in another clinical trial, or attending a structured physical therapy program for your knee?
